original_text: Ngày ấy có đôi bạn chí thân là Quắc và Nhân. Họ đều là con nhà học trò nghèo, lại đều mồ côi cha mẹ, Quắc được học nhiều hơn bạn: anh chàng làm thầy đồ dạy trẻ. Tuy bổng lộc chẳng có là bao nhưng Quắc vẫn thường giúp đỡ Nhân. Đối lại, có lần Quắc bị ốm nặng, giá không có bạn thuốc thang ngày đêm thì anh khó lòng sống nổi. Sau đó cũng vì sinh kế, đôi bạn phải chia tay mỗi người mỗi ngả.
translated_text: In those days, there were two devoted friends named Quắc and Nhân. Both were sons of poor scholars and both were orphans. Quắc was more educated than his friend and worked as a village teacher. Although his income was meager, Quắc often helped Nhân. In return, there was a time when Quắc fell gravely ill, and if not for his friend's round-the-clock care, he would hardly have survived. Later, for the sake of their livelihoods, the two friends had to part ways.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, two young scholars in humble brown clothes studying together in a thatched hut, bamboo furniture, warm and brotherly atmosphere, medium shot, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: poor scholar teacher,poor scholar friend

original_text: Trong khi Quắc sống cuộc đời dạy trẻ thì Nhân cũng đi lang thang đến các vùng xa lạ làm thuê làm mướn. Trải qua một thời kỳ lang bạt, cuối cùng anh chàng vào làm công cho một phú thương. Thấy chàng thật thà chăm chỉ, phú thương rất tin cậy. Chẳng bao lâu Nhân được phú thương gả con gái cho.
translated_text: While Quắc continued his life as a teacher, Nhân wandered to faraway lands, working as a hired laborer. After a period of drifting, he eventually found work with a wealthy merchant. Seeing that he was honest and hardworking, the merchant trusted him greatly. Before long, the merchant married his daughter to Nhân.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a hardworking young man carrying goods for a wealthy merchant in a busy market, the merchant looking impressed, bustling ancient trade scene, medium shot, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: poor scholar friend

original_text: Vợ Nhân có nhiều của riêng. Vì thế Nhân nghiễm nhiên trở nên một phú ông có cơ nghiệp kha khá ở trong vùng.
translated_text: Nhân's wife had a large dowry. Thus, Nhân naturally became a rich man with a considerable fortune in the region.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, poor scholar friend wearing fine silk robes standing in front of a large wealthy wooden mansion, servants in background, symbol of prosperity, wide shot, highly detailed, professional artwork.
subject: poor scholar friend

original_text: Nhân giàu nhưng không quên tình bầu bạn. Nhân vẫn nhớ tới lời thề 'sống chết sướng khổ có nhau' với Quắc. Nhân cất công đi tìm và sung sướng thấy Quắc vẫn còn sống. Tuy Quắc đang dở năm dạy, nhưng Nhân cũng thương lượng được với cha mẹ học trò cho con em chuyển sang một cụ đồ khác rồi đưa Quắc về nhà mình.
translated_text: Though wealthy, Nhân did not forget his friendship. He still remembered his vow with Quắc to 'share life and death, joy and sorrow.' He went to great lengths to find his friend and was overjoyed to see that Quắc was still alive. Although Quắc was in the middle of a teaching year, Nhân negotiated with the students' parents to transfer them to another teacher and then brought Quắc to his home.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the wealthy poor scholar friend joyfully embracing his poor friend poor scholar teacher who is wearing worn-out clothes, village setting, emotional reunion, medium shot, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: poor scholar friend,poor scholar teacher

original_text: Nhân dặn người nhà phải coi Quắc không khác gì mình, cơm nước hầu hạ không được bê trễ. Nhưng tính vợ Nhân không được như chồng. Xưa nay đối với những kẻ rách rưới, chị ta thường tỏ vẻ coi thường. Và, chị ta không cùng sống những ngày hàn vi với Nhân nên có thấy đâu tình nghĩa giữa Nhân và Quắc như thế nào.
translated_text: Nhân instructed his household to treat Quắc as they would treat him, serving meals and attending to him without neglect. But Nhân's wife was not like her husband. She had always looked down on the poor and ragged. And, since she had not lived through the difficult days with Nhân, she could not understand the deep bond between him and Quắc.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, poor scholar teacher sitting at a dining table, poor scholar friend's arrogant wife standing in the background looking with side-eye and disdain, sharp contrast in expressions, interior setting, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: arrogant wife

original_text: Nhưng thấy chồng trọng đãi khách nên lúc đầu chị không dám nói gì. Nhân luôn luôn bảo vợ: - 'Đây là người thân nhất trong đời tôi. Nếu không có bạn thì tôi chưa chắc đã sống để gặp nàng'. Vợ Nhân chỉ lẩm bẩm: - 'Khéo! Bạn với bè! Chỉ có ngồi ăn hại'.
translated_text: However, seeing her husband treat his guest with such high regard, she didn't dare say anything at first. Nhân always told his wife: 'This is the dearest person in my life. Without him, I might not have survived to meet you.' Nhân's wife would only mutter: 'Indeed! Such friends! All he does is sit around and freeload.'
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, poor scholar friend talking earnestly to his arrogant wife, the arrogant wife turning her head away with a look of arrogance and annoyance, domestic tension, medium shot, highly detailed, professional artwork.
subject: arrogant wife

original_text: Dần dần vợ Nhân bực mình ra mặt. Chị ta khó chịu vì cái ông khách lạ tự dưng ở đâu đến chả giúp ích gì cho nhà mình, chỉ chễm chệ trên giường cao, cơm rượu mỗi ngày hai bữa. Vợ Nhân trước còn nói mát sau thì ngoa ngoắt ra mặt.
translated_text: Gradually, Nhân's wife began to show her annoyance openly. She was irritated by this strange guest who had appeared out of nowhere, did nothing to help the household, and only sat comfortably on the fine bed, eating and drinking two meals a day. At first her words were sarcastic, but later she became openly hostile.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the arrogant wife gesturing rudely towards the guest room, face full of anger and stinginess, traditional rich lady clothing, dramatic lighting, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: arrogant wife

original_text: Có hôm người đàn bà ấy đay nghiến cả chồng lẫn khách: - Chẳng phải bố già, không phải khách nợ, ở đâu lại rước về thờ phụng: ăn no lại nằm. Thôi liệu mà tống quái đi!
translated_text: One day, the woman lashed out at both her husband and his guest: 'He's not your old father, nor a creditor, so why did you bring him home to worship? He just eats his fill and lies around. You'd better just get rid of him!'
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the arrogant wife shouting and pointing a finger at poor scholar friend and poor scholar teacher, expression of fury, domestic conflict scene, medium shot, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: arrogant wife,poor scholar friend,poor scholar teacher

original_text: Thấy thái độ vợ ngày càng quá quắt, chồng chỉ sợ mất lòng bạn. Một mặt Nhân thân hành chăm chút bạn chu đáo hơn cả lúc trước, mặt khác Nhân tỷ tê khuyên dỗ vợ. Nhưng vợ Nhân chứng nào vẫn giữ tật ấy.
translated_text: Seeing his wife's increasingly outrageous behavior, the husband's only fear was losing his friend. On one hand, Nhân personally took care of his friend even more attentively than before; on the other, he tried to gently persuade and coax his wife. But she persisted in her ways.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, poor scholar friend personally serving tea to poor scholar teacher with a look of apology and sadness, soft lighting emphasizing friendship, interior close-up, highly detailed, professional artwork.
subject: poor scholar friend,poor scholar teacher

original_text: Về phần Quắc thì chàng hiểu tất cả. Đã hai lần Quắc cáo bạn xin về nhưng Nhân cố giữ lại. Thấy bạn chí tình, Quắc lại nấn ná ít lâu.
translated_text: As for Quắc, he understood everything. Twice, he had told his friend he was leaving, but Nhân insisted he stay. Seeing his friend's deep loyalty, Quắc lingered a while longer.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, poor scholar teacher holding a small bundle trying to leave, poor scholar friend holding his arm to stop him, expression of brotherhood and sorrow, doorway setting, medium shot, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: poor scholar friend,poor scholar teacher

original_text: Nhưng hôm đó Quắc quả quyết ra đi vì chàng vừa nghe được những câu nói xúc phạm nặng nề. Quắc nghĩ, nếu mình không đi sớm thì có ngày bị nhục với người đàn bà này. Mà nếu ra đi như mấy lần trước thì sẽ bị bạn chèo kéo lôi thôi.
translated_text: But on this day, Quắc was determined to leave, for he had just overheard some deeply insulting remarks. Quắc thought that if he didn't leave soon, he would one day be humiliated by this woman. And if he tried to leave as he had before, his friend would only try to stop him.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, poor scholar teacher sitting alone by a candle at night, face full of contemplation and humiliation, deciding to leave, shadowy atmosphere, close-up, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: poor scholar teacher

original_text: Một hôm, trời còn mờ sương, Quắc cất bước lẻn ra khỏi nhà. Để cho bạn khỏi mất công tìm kiếm, khi đi qua một khu rừng, chàng cởi khăn áo treo lên một cành cây bên đường. Đoạn Quắc lần mò đến xứ khác trở lại cuộc đời dạy trẻ.
translated_text: One day, while the morning was still misty, Quắc slipped out of the house. To spare his friend the trouble of searching for him, as he passed through a forest, he took off his turban and tunic and hung them on a tree branch by the road. Then, Quắc made his way to another region to resume his life as a teacher.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a set of scholar's clothes and turban hanging on a tree branch in a misty forest, a figure walking away in the distance, melancholic atmosphere, highly detailed, professional artwork.
subject: poor scholar teacher

original_text: Thấy mất hút bạn, Nhân bổ đi tìm. Khi nghe tin có người bắt được khăn áo ở mé rừng phía Nam, chàng lật đật đến xem. Nhận rõ ấy là khăn áo của bạn, Nhân rất thương cảm: - 'Ta nuôi bạn thành ra hại bạn! Chắc bạn ra bị cướp giết chết'.
translated_text: Discovering his friend was gone, Nhân rushed out to search for him. When he heard that someone had found clothes at the edge of the southern forest, he hurried to see. Recognizing them as his friend's, Nhân was heartbroken: 'By taking you in, I have brought you harm! You must have been robbed and killed.'
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, poor scholar friend finding the clothes on the tree, clutching them with a face of shock and grief, forest background, dramatic moment, medium shot, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: poor scholar friend

original_text: Nhưng sau đó Nhân lại nghĩ khác: - 'Bạn ta ra đi trong túi không có một đồng một chữ thì dầu có gặp cướp cũng không việc gì. Đây một là hùm beo ăn thịt, hai là bị lạc trong rừng sâu'.
translated_text: But then he had another thought: 'My friend left with not a single coin in his pocket, so even if he met robbers, they wouldn't harm him. It must be that he was either eaten by a tiger or has gotten lost in the deep forest.'
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, close-up of poor scholar friend's face showing worry and determination, looking into the dense deep forest, imagining dangers, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: poor scholar friend

original_text: Nhân bắt đầu vào rừng tìm Quắc. Không thấy có vết máu, chàng lại càng hy vọng. Băng hết chông gai, chui hết bụi rậm, Nhân luôn luôn cất tiếng gọi: 'Anh Quắc ơi! Quắc! Quắc!'.
translated_text: Nhân entered the forest to find Quắc. Seeing no traces of blood, his hope grew. Pushing through thorns and crawling through thickets, Nhân constantly called out: 'Brother Quắc! Quắc! Quắc!'
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, poor scholar friend pushing through thorny bushes and dense jungle, clothes torn, mouth open calling out, desperate expression, action shot, highly detailed, professional artwork.
subject: poor scholar friend

original_text: Nhân đi mãi, gọi mãi, quanh quẩn trong khu rừng mênh mông. Cho đến hơi thở cuối cùng con người chí tình ấy vẫn không quên gọi: - 'Quắc!Quắc!'. Rồi đó Nhân chết hóa thành chim quốc, cũng gọi là đỗ quên.
translated_text: Nhân walked and called endlessly, wandering through the vast forest. Until his last breath, the devoted man did not stop calling: 'Quắc! Quắc!'. Then he died and transformed into the Quốc bird, which is also called the đỗ quên.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, poor scholar friend collapsing on the forest floor, a black bird (Water Rail) rising from his position, magical and tragic transformation, forest twilight, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: poor scholar friend (bird)

original_text: Vợ Nhân đợi mãi không thấy chồng về, lấy làm hối hận. Một hôm chị ta bỏ nhà bỏ cửa đi tìm chồng. Cuối cùng cũng đến khu rừng phía Nam. Nghe tiếng 'Quắc! Quắc!', chị ta mừng quá kêu to: - 'Có phải anh đấy không anh Nhân!'.
translated_text: Nhân's wife waited a long time for her husband to return and was filled with regret. One day, she left her home to find him. She eventually reached the southern forest. Hearing the cry 'Quắc! Quắc!', she was overjoyed and shouted: 'Is that you, Nhân!'
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, poor scholar friend's arrogant wife walking alone in the dark forest, looking exhausted and regretful, holding a lantern, eerie atmosphere, medium shot, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: arrogant wife

original_text: Không có tiếng trả lời ngoài những tiếng 'Quắc! Quắc!'. Vợ Nhân cứ thế theo tiếng gọi tiến dần vào rừng sâu. Sau cùng không tìm được lối ra, chết bên cạnh một gốc cây.
translated_text: There was no answer, only the calls of 'Quắc! Quắc!'. Following the sound, Nhân's wife went deeper and deeper into the forest. In the end, unable to find her way out, she died beside a tree.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the arrogant wife lying motionless at the foot of a large tree, a bird perched on a branch looking down, tragic ending, dark forest setting, highly detailed, professional artwork.
subject: arrogant wife
